source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA)
tool_args.raw_text: The following Rules of Conduct and Decorum apply to members of the public who speak at or attend MTA Board and Committee meetings virtually or in-person. If a member of the public violates these rules, the MTA may prevent the violator from continuing to speak, remove them from the premises, prohibit their future attendance, or restrict the camera or microphone of a virtual attendee.

warnings: entity.name is accepted as passthrough, but prefer entity_name. Entity name.
